General.Name: ADICON Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Adicon Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides medical testing services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers medical diagnostic testing services; testing services for research and development projects; and research and clinical trial services. It also engages in the trading of medical testing equipment; and sale of medical products. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
